question_text: Which of the following best describes gravity?

options.label: A
options.text: A force that pushes objects away from planets

options.label: B
options.text: A force of attraction between all objects with mass

options.label: C
options.text: A force that only acts on very heavy objects

options.label: D
options.text: A force that increases with temperature

correct_answer: A force of attraction between all objects with mass
explanation: Gravity is a universal force of attraction that acts between any two objects that have mass, pulling them towards each other.
